title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Marissa Posner - Opening
description:
Marissa Posner kicks off day 2 of the trustless conference, discussing EIL, the trustless manifesto and the differing trust levels of various cross-chain interoperability solutions.

Talk given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
